prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为10662→9679→7833→44178→12229。2021–2023年位次持续前移（数字减小），2024年因广西首次新高考专业组划分出现异 常值44178，2025年回落至12229。近3年（排除2024异常）位次从7833后移至12229，累计后移约4396名，呈竞争缓和趋势；2025年物理类计划25人，2026年计划29人，扩招4人（+16%）。扩招意味着录取名额增加，对考生有利，位次数字倾向于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第65名持续 上升至2025年第51名，2026年微降至第52名，整体处于全国中上游水平；2023年曾有一次偏负面舆情（学校管理回应），但2024–2026年均无显著声誉事件记录 ，近年声誉平稳。抖音综合热度排名第71位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程 A+，两个王牌学科均为全国顶尖水平。食品科学与工程专业在广西理科招生，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工 科专业社会热度持续偏高，江南大学在广西物理类招生的自动化、计算机、人工智能等专业契合热门方向。但食品科学与工程、纺织工程等属于生化环材大类，社会热度偏低。广 西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，按近年物理类占比约67.4%估算，物理类考生约26.4万人，较2025年增加约3800人（+1.45%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；江南大学位于江苏无锡，在广西物理类招生计划从2021年14人增至2026年29人，呈持续扩招态势，对广西考生友好度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12229、2026年扩招16%带来的竞争缓和效应、广西物理类考生增加1.45%带来的竞争加剧效应，以及学校排名稳定、声誉平稳等因素，扩招效应略强于考生增 加效应，但为体现位次波动。预测2026年最低位次约13323名，区间12823–13823名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 10662 → 9679 → 7833 → 44178 → 12229 respectively. Rankings moved forward (decreasing numbers) from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to Guangxi's first new college entrance examination major group division, an abnormal value of 44178 appeared, which dropped back to 12229 in 2025. In the past 3 years (excluding the 2024 anomaly), rankings shifted from 7833 to 12229, a cumulative backward shift of about 4396 places, indicating a trend of easing competition. In 2025, the Physics Category plan had 25 students; in 2026, the plan is 29 students, an increase of 4 students (+16%). Expansion means more admission slots, benefiting candidates, with ranking numbers tending to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking rose from 65th in 2021 to 51st in 2025, slightly dropping to 52nd in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2023, there was one negative public opinion incident (school management response), but from 2024 to 2026, there were no significant reputation events, with stable reputation in recent years. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) and Food Science and Engineering (A+) are both top-tier nationally. Food Science and Engineering enrolls Physics Category students in Guangxi, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular socially. Jiangnan University's Physics Category enrollment in Guangxi includes Automation, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc., aligning with popular directions. However, Food Science and Engineering, Textile Engineering, etc., fall under the broader categories of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, with lower social popularity. In 2026, Guangxi's total ordinary college entrance exam takers are about 392,000; estimating about 67.4% in Physics Category, there are about 264,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3,800 (+1.45%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, and its Physics Category enrollment plan in Guangxi increased from 14 students in 2021 to 29 students in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend, enhancing friendliness to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12229, the easing effect of a 16% expansion in 2026, the intensifying effect of a 1.45% increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, and factors like stable school ranking and reputation, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect, but to reflect ranking fluctuations. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 13323, with a range of 12823–13823.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12823–13823, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Food Science and Engineering A+) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<12823), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Automation and Computer Science. Although Food Science and Engineering is an A+ flagship, its social popularity is low, making it suitable for candidates with a clear interest in this direction.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1720 → 2090 → 1550 → 2783 → 1291 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly, reaching the highest point in recent years in 2025 (rank 1291, most difficult to enter), moving forward substantially by 1492 places compared to 2024.\ nIn 2025, the history category planned to enroll 3 students, and in 2026, the plan remains 3 students, unchanged. The enrollment number is extremely small, making rankings susceptible to large fluctuations due to a few high-scoring candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 52nd in the Soft Science main ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years; reputation has been stable recently, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal surge in application attention signals; Jiangnan University's A+ disciplines (Light Industry Technology and Engineering, Food Science and Engineering) have low relevance to its liberal arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature), and liberal arts majors lack support from top-tier disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors have a relatively high social popularity (recommended), Law is relatively popular, and Teacher Education/Differentiation is in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Guangxi, estimated at about 32.6% of the total, is approximately 128,000, an increase of about 8,600 (+7.25%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition. Jiangnan University's history category enrollment plan in Guangxi is only 3 students and has remained unchanged for years, with an extremely small enrollment scale, and ranking fluctuations are mainly influenced by the choices of a few candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1291, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the intensified competition effect from a 7.25% increase in Guangxi history category candidates, and the fact that the 2025 ranking is at a recent high and difficult to maintain, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly move backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1321, with a range of 1083–1559.
